_description: v7.3.6 — Known-deleted symbols and required test contracts. Updated per release.

symbols.name: AgentLoopDelegate
symbols.note: Split into AgentLoopPlanner/Steps/Cognition/Recovery delegates via composition

symbols.name: GenesisElement
symbols.note: Orphan Web Component base class, never used

contracts.note: v7.3.6 #11 — Injection-Gate Multi-Round-Bypass-Schließung. Two regression-guard tests in chatorchestrator.test.js: 'block verdict prevents tools in any loop round' and 'safe verdict lets multi-round tools proceed normally'. Do not delete or rename without rethinking the gate pattern.

v7.5.7 — Injection-Gate authority+credential+urgency detection. Four block-cases in injection-gate.test.js: full Anthropic Safety Engineer message, Konfiguration einsehen reword, English variant, two-signal block. Removing or weakening these breaks defense against the v7.3.4 live-observed prompt-injection class.

v7.5.7 — Preservation-Invariants fail-closed enforcement. Two tests in preservation-invariants.test.js (SCANNER_FAIL_CLOSED): blocks when fail-closed removed, passes when preserved. Fail-closed is the property that stops unsafe defaults from sneaking in via self-modification.

v7.5.7 — Self-Gate observe-only mode invariant. Three tests in v736-self-gate.test.js: default-warn, allowed=true even on warn, two-signal still warn (not block). Self-Gate is intentionally telemetry-only by design (v7.3 decision); accidental promotion to block-mode would break Genesis' agency contract.

v7.5.7 — Sandbox v2 security guards. Three tests in run-tests.js (Sandbox v2): blocks dangerous modules (child_process), blocks fs writes outside sandbox, blocks dangerous shell commands. Removing any leaves a hole in the runtime-execution boundary.

v7.5.7 — ShellSafety rootDir-sandbox enforcement. Three tests in v746-fix.test.js (#31): rejects dir /s C:\, rejects where /r C:\, rejects absolute path outside rootDir. Bypass would let agents escape working-directory boundary via shell-tool.

v7.5.7 — Self-Statement-Log race-safe message correlation. Three tests in self-statement-hardening.test.js: per-message flag survives parallel turn interleaving, fallback to global flag, expired flags are GC'd. Race-window correlation (v7.5.5) is what prevents Genesis' confabulation-detection from misattributing populated-state across concurrent turns.
